description: Gitea is a self-hosted and hosted Git forge for source code hosting, code review, issues, packages, and related collaboration workflows. The `gitea.com` domain hosts the public service and its documentation.
summary: Gitea exposes a REST API at `https://gitea.com/api/v1` plus an OAuth2/OpenID Connect provider on the main host; documented auth options include personal access tokens, HTTP Basic auth, SSH-based HTTP signatures, and OAuth2 app credentials.
